description: Create a pain assessment experiment at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/pain_vas.psyexp using a vertical Visual Analogue Scale (VAS). The experiment must utilize a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/pain_stimuli.csv containing 'stim_id' and 'image_file' columns with at least 5 rows of dummy data. Each trial loop should include a 0.5s fixation, a 2.0s stimulus image display, and a rating routine. The rating component must be a continuous vertical slider with labels 'No Sensation' and 'Worst Possible Sensation', no visible ticks, and no initial marker. Save the experiment upon completion.
